channel.title: [Blog post] Connecting Gutenberg and Frontity
channel.description:
In this guide, our Product Manager @SantosGuillamot walks you through the process and steps we followed to rebuild our website [frontity.org](https://frontity.org/) with Gutenberg and Frontity.
https://frontity.org/blog/connecting-gutenberg-and-frontity/
Learn about:
- How Block Patterns and Template Parts helped us reuse layout elements and create new pages easily. - How we transformed blocks that required a more complex UI to React components thanks to Html2React. - How we managed to make everything editable from WordPress.
Feel free to reach out with any questions you might have. :)

item.title: [Blog post] Connecting Gutenberg and Frontity
item.dc:creator: Reyes
item.description:
In this guide, our Product Manager @SantosGuillamot walks you through the process and steps we followed to rebuild our website frontity.org with Gutenberg and Frontity.

Frontity – 24 Nov 20

Connecting Gutenberg and Frontity

In this post, we walk you through the process we followed to rebuild our website with Gutenberg and Frontity.

Learn about:

  • How Block Patterns and Template Parts helped us reuse layout elements and create new pages easily.
  • How we transformed blocks that required a more complex UI to React components thanks to Html2React.
  • How we managed to make everything editable from WordPress.

Feel free to reach out with any questions you might have.

Read full topic
